title: wageneria huegelii
intro: Wageneria huegelii is a plant species, also known as the 'Australian waxflower', belonging to the family Rutaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Its health benefits include anti-anxiety effects, improved cardiovascular health, and its ability to combat certain types of infections. The herbal preparations of Wageneria huegelii typically involve the leaves and flowers being used to create teas, infusions, and essential oils, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of uses.
